etymology.description: semantic 竹(竹) (zhú, "bamboo") + phonetic 拑(拑) -> bamboo tool to pinch
etymology.interpretation: The character combines 竹(竹) (zhú, "bamboo"), which represents materials often used for making tools, with 拑(拑) as the phonetic element, suggesting a sound similar to it. Together, they form the concept of a bamboo instrument used for pinching or holding items securely.

examples.chinese: 他用钳子箝住铁丝(他用鉗子箝住鐵絲)。
examples.pinyin: Tā yòng qiánzi qián zhù tiěsī.
examples.english: He used pliers to pinch the wire.

examples.chinese: 箝住大门让它不开(箝住大門讓它不開)，这可不是好主意(這可不是好主意)。
examples.pinyin: Qián zhù dàmén ràng tā bù kāi, zhè kě bù shì hǎo zhǔyì.
examples.english: Holding the door shut is not a good idea.

examples.chinese: 她紧张地箝住自己的手袋(她緊張地箝住自己的手袋)。
examples.pinyin: Tā jǐnzhāng de qián zhù zìjǐ de shǒudài.
